## Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] The PR implements the agreed requirement from `docs/READMEPLAN` or linked issue.
- [ ] All new code is covered by unit tests or e2e tests where applicable.
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`).
- [ ] Type checks pass (`npm run build` or `tsc`).
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/READMEPLAN`, `README.md`, or relevant files).
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing routes or UI — design only improvements.
- [ ] Added migration scripts and DB backfill steps when modifying Prisma models.

<!-- Describe the change & link to issue -->
